slides.headline: Build Strong Partnerships
slides.body: Collaborate with your State Approving Agency to ensure compliance and support student veterans.

slides.headline: Check COE remaining entitlement
slides.body: Verify each student's Certificate of Eligibility (COE) to ensure they meet eligibility requirements.

slides.headline: Log SAA call in the file
slides.body: Document conversations with your State Approving Agency to maintain a record of compliance.
bullets: Use a standard form or template.
Save files in a secure location.

slides.headline: Review SAA guidelines
slides.body: Stay updated with the latest State Approving Agency guidelines to ensure compliance.
bullets: Check your SAA letter for updates.

slides.headline: Update COE if necessary
slides.body: Ensure student eligibility by updating COEs as needed based on new SAA guidelines.
bullets: Refer to VA Form 22-1999 for guidance.

slides.headline: Communicate with SAA
slides.body: Regularly communicate with your State Approving Agency to address any compliance concerns.
Learn more about managing COEs and SAA interactions.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Collaborate with your State Approving Agency to ensure compliance and support student veterans. Steps include checking COE remaining entitlement, logging SAA calls, reviewing SAA guidelines, updating COEs, and communicating regularly. Learn more about managing COEs and SAA interactions. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Review SAA guidelines,' as the text is slightly dense and could benefit from a bit more spacing for better readability.
